blocks.text: C6 owns the injection mechanism. Policy bundles decide what must exist; Workspace creates files deterministically under provider-standard locations inside the task workdir.

items: `AGENTS.md`, loaded by Codex and default instruction-only providers.
Claude `.claude/settings.json` and hook settings when C7 allows native hooks.
`.riido/` run metadata such as task, policy bundle lock, and native config lock.

blocks.text: If SaaS task source provides `riido_telemetry_contract`, supervisor injects the hard rule independently of provider prompt placement. Telemetry contract changes participate in `NativeConfigVersion` input hashes.
SaaS agent presentation fields such as thumbnail URL and description belong to public contracts and control-plane; daemon does not inject those values into native config.
